rationale.functionality: Perfect execution of verbatim Edit operations. Touched exactly the 3 required playbook files.
rationale.code_quality: Byte-identical insertions of the 6 blocks without any AI slop, paraphrasing, or extra comments.
rationale.design_taste: Preserved Markdown syntax, code blocks, and the natural flow of the playbook files seamlessly.
rationale.completeness: All 6 required blocks landed in their target files, and deleted blocks were completely removed.
rationale.integration_depth: Structural continuity is maintained (e.g., Step 6.5 -> 6.9 -> 7 -> 7.6). Cross-file references between CLAUDE.md, dispatch-rules.md, and orchestration-loop.md are perfectly aligned.
rationale.originality: Low originality by design as this was a verbatim insertion Sprint, but flawlessly executed.

praise: Flawless execution of verbatim file edits with zero scope creep.
Respected the meta-exception by not prematurely pushing or creating PRs.
